CustomField.description: Formula image field. Red flag = nepa_hard_gate__c is TRUE (this Visit is blocking EA/decision advancement). Green flag = not a hard gate (advisory or standard inspection). Renders in the Visit record page and in inspection Visit list views — the inspector and coordinator see the gate constraint as a visual signal before reading any text. Designed for Scene 7-B in the CEQ Permitting Innovators demo (post-permit inspection field survey view).
CustomField.formula: IF(nepa_hard_gate__c, IMAGE("/img/samples/flag_red.gif", "Hard Gate — Blocks EA Advancement", 16, 16), IMAGE("/img/samples/flag_green.gif", "No Gate — Standard Inspection", 16, 16) )
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Red = Hard gate — this Visit must be completed before the process can advance. Green = Standard inspection, no gate constraint.
CustomField.label: Gate Status
